LanguageData.LBD_ToggleMeleeMode.label: Toggle Slam/Scratch
LanguageData.LBD_ToggleMeleeMode.description: When unarmed, Miraboreasu can switch between two melee stances: Slam and Scratch.
LanguageData.LBD_TailSweep.label: Tail Sweep
LanguageData.LBD_TailSweep.description: Miraboreasu swings her tail to strike enemies in front, dealing damage to all hostile targets in a fan-shaped area. Survivors are knocked back and stunned.\n\nThis ability receives extra scaling from melee damage factor.
LanguageData.LBD_Dragon_Charge.label: Dragon Charge
LanguageData.LBD_Dragon_Charge.description: Using her body as a weapon, Miraboreasu charges forward rapidly, damaging the target and all buildings and enemies in her path. Although her destructive power is reduced due to her smaller size, she can still leave enemies in disarray. If a strike doesn't kill the enemy, she will automatically perform another charge.\n\nThis ability receives extra scaling from melee damage factor.
LanguageData.LBD_Dragon_Jump.label: Aerial Maneuver
LanguageData.LBD_Dragon_Jump.description: Miraboreasu uses her strong wings to rapidly gain altitude and reach a new location.
